# Jane Smith *Senior Software Engineer* - **Email:** jane@example.com - **Phone:** +1-555-987-6543 - **Website:** [https://janesmith.dev](https://janesmith.dev) - **Location:** San Francisco, ## Summary Full-stack engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable web applications. Passionate about clean architecture, performance optimization, and mentoring teams. ## Profiles - **LinkedIn:** [janesmith](https://linkedin.com/in/janesmith) - **GitHub:** [janesmith](https://github.com/janesmith) ## Work Experience ### Tech Corp **Senior Software Engineer** *(2020-03-01 - )* - **Location:** - **Keywords:** - **Highlights:** - Reduced API latency by 45% through caching and query optimization - Designed microservices architecture serving 2M daily requests - Mentored 4 junior engineers through technical growth plans - **Summary:** Lead engineer for the platform team, owning core API infrastructure. - **URL:** [](https://techcorp.com) ### StartupXYZ **Full Stack Developer** *(2017-06-01 - 2020-02-28)* - **Location:** - **Keywords:** - **Highlights:** - Built real-time dashboard used by 15,000+ daily active users - Implemented CI/CD pipeline reducing deploy time from 2 hours to 8 minutes - **Summary:** Built customer-facing web applications from prototype to production. - **URL:** []() ## Projects ### Open Source CLI Tool *2022-01-01 - * - **Description:** Developer productivity tool with 2,000+ GitHub stars - **Roles:** - **Entity:** - **URL:** [https://github.com/janesmith/cli-tool](https://github.com/janesmith/cli-tool) ## Education ### University of Technology *2013-09-01 - 2017-05-15* - **Area:** Computer Science - **Study Type:** Bachelor of Science - **URL:** []() - **Score:** 3.8 - **Courses:** - **Skills:** ## Awards ## Skills - **Languages** - *Level:* Expert - *Keywords:* TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Go - **Frontend** - *Level:* Expert - *Keywords:* React, Next.js, HTML/CSS, Tailwind - **Backend & Cloud** - *Level:* Advanced - *Keywords:* Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker ## Languages ## Interests ## Volunteer Experience
